thig5.6:2.1: Missing out on the foremost goal,
thig5.6:2.4: I didn’t awaken to the goal of the contemplative life.
thig5.6:3.2: I suddenly came to my senses:
thig5.6:3.4: I’m under the sway of craving.
thig5.6:4.4: I have no time for heedlessness.
thig5.6:5.1: After watching, as it actually was,
thig5.6:5.3: I stood up with mind released,
